job_description.title: Machine Learning Engineer II
job_description.pay_range: USA base pay range (CA, WA, NY, NJ, CT) per year: Min: $138,800, Mid: $173,500, Max: $208,200; USA base pay range (all other U.S. states) per year: Min: $124,900, Mid: $156,100, Max: $187,300

items: Use Affirm’s proprietary and other third party data to develop machine learning models that predict the likelihood of default and make an approval or decline decision to achieve business objectives
Partner with platform and product engineering teams to build model training, decisioning, and monitoring systems
Research ground breaking solutions and develop prototypes that drive the future of credit decisioning at Affirm
Implement and scale data pipelines, new features, and algorithms that are essential to our production models
Collaborate with the engineering, credit, and product teams to define requirements for new products

company_profile.name: Affirm
company_profile.description: Affirm is reinventing credit to make it more honest and friendly, giving consumers the flexibility to buy now and pay later without any hidden fees or compounding interest.

compensation.base_pay: USA base pay range (CA, WA, NY, NJ, CT) per year: Min: $138,800, Mid: $173,500, Max: $208,200; USA base pay range (all other U.S. states) per year: Min: $124,900, Mid: $156,100, Max: $187,300
